# K98 Bot Templates

Use `Codex Task Pack Template.md` as the single active template for Codex task packs, execution
prompts, deferred optimisation batches, and standard development initiation.

The archived files in `archive/` are historical pointers only. Do not use them as active guidance.

Core reading rules live in `AGENTS.md`, `README-DEV.md`, and `docs/reference/README.md`.
